steps.title: Identify that the mass is positive
steps.content: Since the mass is described as positive, we know it must be greater than zero. $$m \gt 0$$

steps.title: Apply the upper bound
steps.content:
The mass must also be less than 620 grams, giving $$m \lt 620$$. Combining both inequalities yields $$0 \lt m \lt 620$$.
That confirms D is correct.
